meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Projects Fast
content.seo_description: Break through development plateaus. Learn how to debug complex SaaS apps using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate-level freelance case study.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracing logs. Leverage AI-driven debugging to analyze stack traces and identify architectural bottlenecks instantly. By integrating Antigravity and Claude Code into your workflow, you can automate root-cause analysis, refactor legacy codebases, and ship production-ready features in half the time, effectively doubling your freelance project delivery speed.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is impatient, and you’re staring at a cryptic stack trace that makes no sense. You’ve built the basics, but now your app is hitting a wall—spaghetti code, race conditions, and obscure environment errors are stalling your momentum. You aren't just stuck; you're losing billable hours to the grind of manual debugging.

But the era of manual troubleshooting is over. By treating your codebase as a data set for AI to analyze, you can skip the trial-and-error cycle. This guide shows you how to weaponize Antigravity and Claude Code to turn complex, project-killing bugs into solved tickets in minutes.

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Before debugging, ensure the AI understands your stack. We map the dependency tree so the model doesn't hallucinate irrelevant solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory structure and generate a dependency map. Identify potential circular dependencies and bottlenecks in our current architecture.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed the raw error log into the system to let the AI correlate the crash with specific lines of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Examine this stack trace. Cross-reference the error with the codebase and pinpoint the specific function causing the memory leak.

steps.title: Isolate the Logic Failure
steps.description: Use AI to write a targeted unit test that replicates the bug, proving the failure point before applying a fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest test case that reproduces this specific race condition. Ensure it fails consistently before we apply a patch.

steps.title: Refactor with Guardrails
steps.description: Apply the fix while ensuring existing features remain intact. We use AI to refactor for both performance and readability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified function for O(n) complexity. Ensure the fix addresses the race condition without breaking existing API contracts.

steps.title: Final Validation and Regression Check
steps.description: Run the full suite to verify the fix and ensure no side effects were introduced during the refactor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full regression test suite and provide a summary report on coverage improvements post-fix.

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'system prompt' file to ensure it adheres to your preferred coding style conventions.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to persist context across multiple sessions so you don't have to re-explain your architecture.
When debugging production issues, sanitize sensitive environment variables from logs before passing them to any AI model.
Create a custom 'debug-agent' configuration in Antigravity to trigger specific linting rules every time you initiate a fix.
If the AI struggles with a complex bug, ask it to 'explain the logic as a sequence diagram' to visualize the data flow.
resources: Best Practices for AI Engineering: https://ai.engineering/handbook
content.next_steps: Once your bug is resolved, audit your entire module for technical debt using the same AI workflow to prevent future regressions.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your development velocity. Take control of your workflow, master the tools of the future, and start shipping like a top-tier engineer today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
